entry.title: New: RES25-177 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF AIRFARE AND TRAIN TRANSPORTATION VALUED AT APPROXIMATELY $1,080 (¥155,680) FROM THE INTERNATIONAL YOUTH CONFERENCE FOR PEACE IN THE FUTURE COMMITTEE (IYCPF) FOR A MEMBER OF THE HONOLULU YOUTH COMMISSION TO ATTEND THE IYCPF 2025 CONFERENCE IN HIROSHIMA, JAPAN, FROM AUGUST 1-9, 2025.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution as amended were adopted.

View on the council site
